smapsActiveEntity.msgText: 191412Z MAY 26 NAVAREA XII 355/26. NORTH PACIFIC. 1. S/V ZORBA, THREE PERSONS ON BOARD, DISABLED AND ADRIFT IN 13-10.51N 151-04.51W. VESSELS IN VICINITY REQUESTED TO KEEP A SHARP LOOKOUT, ASSIST IF POSSIBLE. REPORTS TO JRCC HONOLULU, PHONE: 800 331 6176, EMAIL: JRCCHONOLULU@USCG.MIL. 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XII 354/26.

181956Z MAY 26 NAVAREA XII 353/26. NORTH PACIFIC. CALIFORNIA. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 210130Z TO 211100Z MAY IN AREA BOUND BY 33-34.00N 120-26.00W, 33-57.00N 119-16.00W, 33-41.00N 119-08.00W, 33-17.00N 120-19.00W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 211200Z MAY 26.

181623Z MAY 26 NAVAREA XII 351/26. NORTH PACIFIC. CALIFORNIA. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 1330Z TO 0100Z DAILY 18 THRU 21 AND 220130Z TO 221100Z MAY IN AREA BOUND BY 33-34.00N 120-26.00W, 33-17.00N 120-19.00W, 33-41.00N 119-08.00W, 33-57.00N 119-16.00W. 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XII 348/26. 3. CANCEL THIS MSG 221200Z MAY 26.

111848Z MAY 26 NAVAREA XII 349/26. NORTH PACIFIC. CALIFORNIA. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS, ROCKET LAUNCHING: A. 221400Z TO 221824Z MAY, ALTERNATE 1400Z TO 1824Z DAILY 23 THRU 28 MAY IN AREA BOUND BY 31-46.00N 121-08.00W, 31-43.00N 121-15.00W, 34-41.00N 120-39.00W, 34-31.00N 120-26.00W. B. 221400Z TO 221843Z MAY, ALTERNATE 1400Z TO 1843Z DAILY 23 THRU 28 MAY IN AREA BOUND BY 28-16.00N 121-48.00W, 28-34.00N 122-21.00W, 29-47.00N 121-46.00W, 29-47.00N 121-35.00W, 28-39.00N 121-25.00W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 281943Z MAY 26.

152240Z MAY 26 NAVAREA XII 347/26. NORTH PACIFIC. CALIFORNIA. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 1700Z TO 2230Z DAILY 19 AND 20 MAY IN AREA BOUND BY 33-15.00N 121-55.00W, 33-14.00N 122-22.00W, 34-29.00N 123-00.00W, 34-04.00N 120-52.00W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 202330Z MAY 26.

151607Z MAY 26 NAVAREA XII 345/26. 1. NAVAREA XII WARNINGS IN FORCE AS OF 151526Z MAY. 344/2026, 343/2026, 342/2026, 341/2026, 340/2026, 339/2026, 338/2026, 337/2026, 331/2026, 330/2026, 327/2026, 299/2026, 298/2026, 297/2026, 296/2026, 287/2026, 280/2026, 276/2026, 216/2026, 125/2026, 98/2026, 88/2026. 718/2025, 678/2025, 422/2025, 392/2025, 354/2025, 344/2025, 338/2025, 259/2025, 208/2025. 862/2024, 441/2024. 93/2023. 721/2022, 720/2022, 244/2022, 243/2022. 2. THE COMPLETE TEXT OF ALL IN-FORCE NAVAREA XII BROADCAST WARNINGS ARE AVAILABLE ON THE NGA MARITIME SAFETY INFORMATION WEBSITE AT: msi.nga.mil/NavWarnings. ALTERNATIVELY, THESE MAY BE REQUESTED BY E-MAIL FROM THE NAVAREA XII COORDINATOR AT NAVSAFETY@NGA.MIL. 3. CANCEL NAVAREA XII 332/26.

060341Z MAY 26 NAVAREA XII 337/26. NORTH PACIFIC. CALIFORNIA. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS, ROCKET LAUNCHING: A. 170211Z TO 170635Z MAY, ALTERNATE 0211Z TO 0635Z DAILY 18 THRU 25 MAY IN AREA BOUND BY 31-46.00N 121-08.00W, 31-43.00N 121-15.00W, 34-41.00N 120-39.00W, 34-31.00N 120-26.00W. B. 170211Z TO 170654Z MAY, ALTERNATE 0211Z TO 0654Z DAILY 18 THRU 25 MAY IN AREA BOUND BY 28-16.00N 121-48.00W, 28-34.00N 122-21.00W, 29-47.00N 121-46.00W, 29-47.00N 121-35.00W, 28-39.00N 121-25.00W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 250754Z MAY 26.

072317Z MAY 26 NAVAREA XII 330/26. NORTH PACIFIC. CALIFORNIA. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS, ROCKET LAUNCHING: A. 091400Z TO 091824Z MAY, ALTERNATE 1400Z TO 1824Z DAILY 10 THRU 21 MAY IN AREA BOUND BY 31-46.00N 121-08.00W, 31-43.00N 121-15.00W, 34-41.00N 120-39.00W, 34-31.00N 120-26.00W. B. 091400Z TO 091843Z MAY, ALTERNATE 1400Z TO 1843Z DAILY 10 THRU 21 MAY IN AREA BOUND BY 28-16.00N 121-48.00W, 28-34.00N 122-21.00W, 29-47.00N 121-46.00W, 29-47.00N 121-35.00W, 28-39.00N 121-25.00W. 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XII 318/26. 3. CANCEL THIS MSG 211943Z MAY 26.
071924Z MAY 26 NAVAREA XII 327/26. NORTH PACIFIC. CABLE OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE BY CABLESHIP CABLE INNOVATOR IN 41-15.06N 150-15.11W. WIDE BERTH REQUESTED.

260540Z APR 26 NAVAREA XII 298/26. NORTH PACIFIC. CALIFORNIA. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 010800Z MAY TO 010800Z JUN IN AREA BOUND BY 32-55.00N 118-25.00W, 32-55.00N 118-15.00W, 32-40.00N 118-15.00W, 32-40.00N 118-35.00W, 32-45.00N 118-35.00W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 010900Z JUN 26.

260520Z APR 26 NAVAREA XII 297/26. NORTH PACIFIC. CALIFORNIA. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 010800Z MAY TO 010800Z JUN IN AREA BOUND BY 32-33.00N 118-25.00W, 32-35.00N 118-16.00W, 32-35.00N 117-40.00W, 31-55.00N 117-40.00W, 31-55.00N 118-25.00W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 010900Z JUN 26.

260447Z APR 26 NAVAREA XII 296/26. NORTH PACIFIC. CALIFORNIA. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 010800Z MAY TO 010800Z JUN IN AREA BOUND BY 32-47.55N 118-25.58W, 32-47.65N 118-24.88W, 32-47.47N 118-24.45W, 32-47.10N 118-24.77W, 32-47.23N 118-25.38W, 32-47.40N 118-25.98W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 010900Z JUN 26.
231812Z APR 26 NAVAREA XII 287/26. NORTH PACIFIC. CALIFORNIA. CANCEL NAVAREA XII 270/26 AND THIS MSG, OPERATIONS COMPLETED.

190624Z APR 26 NAVAREA XII 276/26. NORTH PACIFIC. HAWAII. 1. USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITY HONOLULU 21-22.00N 158-09.00W TRANSMIT SERVICES UNRELIABLE. 2. HONOLULU BROADCASTS WILL BE TRANSMITTED FROM USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITY GUAM 13-25.00N 144-50.00E. 3. DSC RESPONSES WILL BE TRANSMITTED FROM USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITY POINT REYES 37-56.00N 122-44.00W. 4. CANCEL NAVAREA XII 274/26.

280808Z MAR 26 NAVAREA XII 216/26. NORTH PACIFIC. WEATHER MESSAGE SERVICES INTERRUPTED AT USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITIES: A. PT REYES 37-55.00N 122-24.00W. B. HONOLULU 21-22.00N 158-09.00W. C. KODIAK 57-46.00N 152-34.00W. D. NOME 64-29.00N 165-15.00W. E. COLD BAY 55-11.00N 162-42.00W. F. ST PAUL 57-09.00N 170-14.00W. G. SHEMYA 52-43.00N 174-07.00E. H. PT HIGGINS 55-27.00N 131-49.00W. I. ASTORIA 46-10.00N 123-49.00W. J. BERING SEA 57-46.00N 152-34.00W. K. CAMBRIA 33-44N 118-24W.
252035Z FEB 26 NAVAREA XII 125/26(16). ALASKA. USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITY COLD BAY 55-11.00N 162-42.00W. HF TRANSMIT AND RECEIVE SERVICES OFF AIR.
171634Z FEB 26 NAVAREA XII 98/26(16). BERING SEA. ALASKA. USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITY SHEMYA 52-43.00N 174-07.00E HF TRANSMIT AND RECEIVE SERVICES INOPERATIVE.

112030Z FEB 26 NAVAREA XII 88/26(GEN). EASTERN NORTH PACIFIC. DSC SERVICES UNAVAILABLE AT USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITIES: A. HONOLULU (O) 21-26.00N 158-09.00W. B. PT REYES (C) 37-56.00N 122-44.00W. C. KODIAK (J) 57-46.00N 152-34.00W.
132105Z NOV 25 NAVAREA XII 718/25(16). GULF OF ALASKA. 1. WEATHER FAX SERVICES OFF AIR AT USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITY KODIAK (J) 57-46.00N 152-34.00W. 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XII 460/24.
141418Z JUL 25 NAVAREA XII 422/25(16). BERING STRAIT. ALASKA. SCIENTIFIC MOORINGS, AT DEPTH 15 METERS, ESTABLISHED IN: A. 65-46.86N 168-34.07W. B. 65-44.76N 168-15.75W.

242359Z JUN 25 NAVAREA XII 392/25(16). NORTH PACIFIC. M/V MORNING MIDAS SANK IN 45-16.88N 179-14.13W. VESSELS IN VICINITY REQUESTED TO NAVIGATE WITH CAUTION AND REPORT PRESENCE OF OIL SHEENS OR DEBRIS TO USCG SECTOR WESTERN ALASKA AND US ARCTIC, PHONE: 907 428 4100, E-MAIL: SOUTHWESTERNAK@USCG.MIL.

130011Z JUN 25 NAVAREA XII 354/25(GEN). EASTERN NORTH PACIFIC. MESSAGING SERVICES UNRELIABLE AT USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITIES: A. PT REYES (C) 37-55.50N 122-43.90W. B. HONOLULU (O) 21-26.00N 158-09.00W. C. KODIAK (J) 57-46.00N 152-34.00W. D. ASTORIA (W) 46-10.00N 123-49.00W. E. CAMBRIA (Q) 33-44.00N 118-24.00W.
100619Z JUN 25 NAVAREA XII 344/25(16). BERING SEA. ALASKA. COMMDET KODIAK, AK REMOTE SITE SHEMYA 52-43.00N 174-07.00E HF R/T SERVICES OFF AIR.
071202Z JUN 25 NAVAREA XII 338/25(18). OREGON. USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITY ASTORIA (W) 46-10.00N 123-49.00W OFF AIR.
051901Z MAY 25 NAVAREA XII 259/25(16). GULF OF ALASKA. ALASKA. USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITY KODIAK (J) 57-46.00N 152-34.00W HF AND DSC SERVICES UNRELIABLE.
061220Z APR 25 NAVAREA XII 208/25(22). EASTERN NORTH PACIFIC. COLOMBIA. PUNTA SOLDADO LIGHT 03-48.50N 077-10.80W DISCONTINUED.

281257Z OCT 24 NAVAREA XII 862/24(83). EASTERN NORTH PACIFIC. KIRIBATI. CABLE OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE IN VICINITY OF TRACKLINE JOINING 02-01.46N 157-29.67W, 02-01.45N 157-29.69W, 02-01.45N 157-29.72W, 02-01.42N 157-29.82W, 02-01.36N 157-30.04W, 02-01.22N 157-30.29W, 02-00.20N 157-32.23W. 100 METER BERTH REQUESTED.
182355Z JUN 24 NAVAREA XII 441/24(21). EASTERN NORTH PACIFIC. MEXICO. MORRO SANTO DOMINGO LIGHT 28-14.37N 114-06.18W UNLIT.

282248Z FEB 23 NAVAREA XII 93/23(19). NORTH PACIFIC. HAWAII. 1. INTERMITTENT MISSILE FIRING OPERATIONS CONDUCTED BY THE PACIFIC MISSILE RANGE FACILITY (PMRF), BARKING SANDS, KAUAI, HAWAII, IN WHISKEY 188 (W-188) OPERATING AREA. OPERATIONS ARE CONDUCTED PERIODICALLY THROUGHOUT EACH WEEK IN AREA BOUND BY 22-00.0N 159-51.0W, 22-00.0N 160-00.0W, 22-04.0N 160-06.0W, 21-59.5N 160-21.0W, 22-05.0N 161-35.0W, 22-45.0N 161-25.0W, 22-56.0N 161-49.0W, 23-34.0N 161-18.6W, 23-57.0N 160-41.0W, 25-41.0N 161-36.0W, 26-00.0N 159-58.0W, 25-47.0N 158-15.0W, 23-54.0N 158-15.0W, 22-20.0N 159-09.0W, 22-21.0N 159-30.0W, 22-13.0N 159-42.0W, 22-00.0N 159-51.0W. 2. VESSELS MAY BE REQUESTED TO ALTER COURSE DUE TO FIRING OPERATIONS AND ARE REQUESTED TO CONTACT "PACIFIC MISSILE RANGE BARKING SANDS" ON VHF MARINE BAND CHANNEL 16 PRIOR TO ENTERING THE ABOVE BOUNDARIES. IF UNABLE TO CONTACT PMRF PRIOR TO ENTERING OR WHILE IN THE WARNING AREA, RELAY MESSAGES THROUGH U.S. COAST GUARD HONOLULU. 3. VESSELS INBOUND AND OUTBOUND FOR HAWAIIAN PORTS WILL CREATE THE LEAST INTERFERENCE TO FIRING OPERATIONS AS WELL AS ENHANCE VESSEL SAFETY BY PASSING SOUTH OF THE ISLANDS OF KAUAI AND NIIHAU DURING SPECIFIED TIMES. 4. CANCEL NAVAREA XII 269/21.
272221Z SEP 22 NAVAREA XII 721/22(21). EL SALVADOR. CHART 21524 MOORING BUOYS 13-35.23N 089-51.10W UNLIT.
272211Z SEP 22 NAVAREA XII 720/22(21). EASTERN NORTH PACIFIC. EL SALVADOR. CHART 12529. PUERTO DE LA UNION 16 BUOY 13-20.36N 087-48.99W UNLIT.
MSGID/GENADMIN/NGA NAVSAFETY WASHINGTON DC// RMKS/ NAVAREA XII 244/22(21). GOLFO DE CALIFORNIA. MEXICO. CHART 21120. BOCA DEL TULE LIGHT 23-14.3N 109-26.4W UNLIT.

MSGID/GENADMIN/NGA NAVSAFETY WASHINGTON DC// RMKS/ NAVAREA XII 243/22(18). EASTERN NORTH PACIFIC. MEXICO. CHART 18740. 1. CORONADO ISLAND SOUTH LIGHT 32-23.5N 117-14.5W UNLIT. 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XII 159/21.
